mapper.insert: insert into tb_voucher (shop_id, title, sub_title, type, discount, condition_amount, stock, issued_count, use_count, limit_per_user, status, start_time, end_time) values (#{shopId}, #{title}, #{subTitle}, #{type}, #{discount}, #{conditionAmount}, #{stock}, #{issuedCount}, #{useCount}, #{limitPerUser}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.update: update tb_voucher set stock = stock - #{count} where id = #{id} and stock >= #{count}
